---
title: Business creation stalls across rural regions
description: Line chart showing rural establishment counts by Census region over time.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-rural-region-establishments-lc/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Entrepreneurship
  - Rural Development
  - Geography
tags:
  - BDS
  - Establishments
  - Business Creation
  - Rural
  - Regional
  - Line Chart
image: 4.1_rural_region_establishments_lc.svg
chart:
  title: Business creation stalls across rural regions
  chartType: line
  interactive: false
  source: U.S. Census Bureau
  sourceUrl: https://www.census.gov/programs-surveys/bds.html
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - census-bds
usesPackages:
  - cori-data-bds
  - ruraldefinitions
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This chart tracks total establishment counts in rural areas by Census region, showing stagnation in business creation.](./4.1_rural_region_establishments_lc.svg)

## Overview

This chart tracks total establishment counts in rural areas by Census region, showing stagnation in business creation.

## Key Findings

- Rural establishment counts have stagnated across all regions
- The Great Recession caused a significant decline in rural establishments
- Recovery in establishment counts has been slow and uneven

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/estab_by_region_lc.R` in the producing project.
